name: GH_AutoSaveTrigger
summary: Different types of events that can cause an AutoSave.

enum_values.name: undefined
enum_values.summary: Generic autosave trigger, this flag is not filtered.

enum_values.name: doc_unload
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by a document being unloaded from a Canvas Context.

enum_values.name: object_added
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by the addition of an object to the document.

enum_values.name: object_removed
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by the removal of an object from the document.

enum_values.name: wire_event
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by a change in connector wires.

enum_values.name: data_matching_event
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by a change to Data Matching settings.

enum_values.name: data_modification_event
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by a change to Data modifier settings.

enum_values.name: object_generic
enum_values.summary: Autosave was triggered by a non-trivial change to object data or settings.
